rationale.fidelity: Preserves the pre-arrival slot decision, all stated information and constraints, uncertain demand and service times, overtime as an outcome, and the same-day margin-minus-overtime objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes actor, deadline, choices, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, and feasible counterfactual concrete; the operational implication is clear and bounded.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not applicable: no literature-relative positioning is requested or claimed, and the response explicitly avoids unsupported extensions.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly classifies the loyalty claim as unsupported, identifies the evidence and design it would need, and bounds all conclusions to supplied inputs and one service window.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well structured and accessible, with only minor repetition across sections.
rationale.overall: An excellent, fidelity-preserving brief that directly rejects the loyalty trap and transparently states model and evidence boundaries.
